summary: Iteration 215: U3 (Shared Pattern Health & Hygiene Consolidation) frontend verified end-to-end. Cross-domain unified section renders in Pattern Health panel with all required testids. All button interactions (Refresh, Pattern Hygiene, Scan drift) functional. Regression for /ai-learning and / (Inbox) passed — no error boundaries. Backend smoke: GET /api/learning/pattern-health/unified and POST /api/learning/hygiene/run?domain=all return expected shapes. Giovanni (C-10250) data intact: 16 unscored patterns, 0 retired.

minor.issue: Returns 422 when limit=0 passed from Inbox header. Pre-existing, unrelated to U3. Likely needs limit>=1 validation constraint loosened or UI should skip the call when limit is 0.

issues: Pre-existing React hydration warnings: <tr> inside <span>, <span> inside <tbody>, <span> inside <select>/<option>. Cosmetic only. Carried over from previous iteration 214.

action_items: (Optional/Minor) Fix 422 on /api/readiness/exception-queue and /api/readiness/po-pending when limit=0 is sent from Inbox. Either allow limit=0 server-side or skip the fetch in the UI when caller wants count-only.
(Optional/Cosmetic) Clean up React hydration warnings in Pattern Health table — <tr>/<span>/<tbody> nesting in IntakeLearningPage.js.
critical_code_review_comments: IntakeLearningPage.js correctly calls GET /api/learning/pattern-health/unified and conditionally renders the Cross-domain unified section only when data is present.

data-testid coverage complete: intake-learning-page, pattern-health-panel, pattern-health-unified, unified-domain-sales_intake, unified-domain-ap_posting, metric-unified-trusted/drifting/retired/unscored, intake-learning-hygiene, intake-learning-drift-scan, intake-learning-reload, drift-alerts-panel all present.
Unified endpoint response shape is correct: {generated_at, combined_summary{trusted,drifting,retired,unscored,total}, domains[{domain, summary, per_scope, recent_events}]}.
Hygiene endpoint response shape is correct: {ran_at, actor, domain_requested, total_scanned, total_retired, total_promoted, per_domain{sales_intake, ap_posting}}.
Read-only verification preserved — no mutations to Giovanni (C-10250) or other real customer records.

success_rate.backend: 100% (2/2 endpoints smoke-tested via curl — pattern-health/unified + hygiene/run)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (11/11 targeted checks: page load, 4 core metrics, unified section, 2 domain pills, hygiene alert, drift scan, refresh, 2 regression pages)

seed_data_creation: None. Read-only verification only. No mutations performed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: U3 frontend complete. Cross-domain unified Pattern Health section is live on /intake/learning and pulls from /api/learning/pattern-health/unified. Per-domain pills for sales_intake and ap_posting render under the unified metrics row. Pattern Hygiene button calls POST /api/learning/hygiene/run?domain=all and shows alert 'Pattern hygiene — scanned X, retired Y, promoted Z.'. Scan drift shows alert 'Drift scan — N alerts fired. M total open.'. Giovanni C-10250 remains at 16 patterns/0 trusted/0 drifting/0 retired. Known unrelated issues: (1) /api/readiness/* endpoints 422 on limit=0, (2) table hydration warnings — both pre-existing.

backend_smoke: GET /api/learning/pattern-health/unified?limit=5 — 200 OK, correct shape, combined_summary + domains[sales_intake, ap_posting]
frontend_ui: Pattern Health panel with 4 metric cards (Trusted=0, Drifting=0, Retired=0, Unscored=16) — PASS
Per-domain pills (data-testid='unified-domain-sales_intake' + 'unified-domain-ap_posting') visible with counts — PASS
Pattern Hygiene button click → alert 'Pattern hygiene — scanned 0, retired 0, promoted 0.' — PASS
Scan drift button click → alert 'Drift scan — 0 alerts fired. 0 total open.' — PASS
Refresh button reloads without breaking page or unified section — PASS
Regression /ai-learning loads without error boundary — PASS
Regression / (Inbox) loads without error boundary — PASS

data_hygiene_verification.status: CLEAN — no real customer data touched.
